ops.title: Consolidate install-binary.sh into cc-interact's plugin-template
ops.description: The channelsetup audit (2026-07-17) found the plugin installer script (scripts/install-binary.sh) likely triplicated across the cc-review, cc-present, and cc-orchestrate plugins with drift risk. Verify the copies, diff them, and make cc-interact's plugin-template the single source (consumers re-render). Note-only finding.

ops.text: the consumer plugins' install-binary.sh copies are diffed and reconciled against one plugin-template source
consumer copies are re-rendered from the template (or divergence is recorded as intentional)
